title: Luffy Charges Into the Wax Trap
description: On pages 1–4, luffy charges into the wax trap as luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants.
scene: Luffy Charges Into the Wax Trap. Luffy and Usopp push back against Baroque Works on Little Garden while Mr. 3’s wax execution threatens the crew and the giants. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Did you really think that the likes of you could seriously escape from Baroque Works' grasp?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Kyhahahaha! Even a pirate worth 30 million bell,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: is of no match for us... kyahahaha.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fufu... I'm glad I was able to repay you for what you did at whiskey peak.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: A wannabe pirate like you shouldn't have stuck your nose in our delicate affairs.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We've already captured your swordsman friend and the girl as well...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You got zero? Then you'll be cut down for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Oh? So you can still talk, can you?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Even after I dished out all those "kick bombs" of mine to your face...

summary: This part centers on luffy charges into the wax trap, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
